patchlogs.name: Echoes of War: Banshee & Mirage Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.1.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed crash related to the Anku Blueprint in the Tenno Lab.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.5.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Spearmint Scythe skin hand positions being offset on the Anku and Caustacyst.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2
patchlogs.changes: Anku damage has been decreased in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Chat tab overlapping the ‘Purchase’ icon for the Anku when displayed in Spanish or Russian.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.8.3
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Anku not appearing in the Codex.
Fixed Sugatras not properly attaching to the Anku.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.7
patchlogs.changes: The Anku is available for use in PvP.
patchlogs.fixes:
Anku scythe available now!
Reap havoc with the Anku! This full-sized Tenno scythe's design is inspired by the Paris Bow and is just as deadly.
Add the Anku to your Arsenal by visiting the Market or Tenno Clan Research today!
